rows.name: chacha20_quarter_round
rows.notes: test-only entry; QR(0,4,8,12) over RFC-7539-primed cc20_work

rows.name: chacha20_encrypt n=64
rows.notes: single full block, key/nonce primed, in-place XOR

rows.name: poly1305_multiply
rows.notes: one 17x16 mul over clamped RFC r and primed h

rows.name: poly1305_reduce
rows.notes: one mod-2^130-5 reduction over fixed poly_product pattern

rows.name: poly1305_block
rows.notes: one 16 B block: add + multiply + reduce (A=1 shim)

rows.name: aead_compute_tag
rows.notes: tag compute over n=1024 ciphertext + 0-byte AAD + lengths

rows.name: ct_mul_8x8
rows.notes: Profile B 8x8->16 multiply primitive; loop-of-64 with varied (a,b) operands; reported as cycles/call after dividing wrapper measurement by loop count

rows.name: aead_encrypt n=0
rows.notes: AEAD per-packet fixed cost (OTK derive + 0-byte tag)
